descriptionText: Beneteau Oceanis 41.1 For Sale 2019 | Guest Cabins:3 | bathrooms:1Engine hours 600 only!The Beneteau Oceanis 41.1 For Sale 2019 is a well‑kept and attractively equipped sailing yacht, now available for viewing in Basilicata. Known for its balanced design, comfortable layout and reliable performance under sail or engine, this 2019 example stands out thanks to careful ownership and regular maintenance. With just one owner since new and annual servicing carried out, she is in good condition and ready for a new season on the water.(Bimini,Autopilot,Solar panels)Specification List • GRP construction • Teak cockpit • Grey cockpit cushions • Cast‑iron bulb keel • Sprayhood • Bimini • Cockpit table with fridge • LOA 12.43 m • Beam 4.20 m • Draft 2.19 m • Displacement 7,836 kg • One owner • CE Category A • Registered boat • Safety certificate valid until 2027 • Capacity 12 persons • Three double cabins • One dinette berth • One bathroom • One shower compartment • Light mahogany interior • Stove, oven, fridge + freezer • 32” smart TV • 45 hp Yanmar engine (2019) • 600 engine hours (updated Oct 2025) • 200 L fuel tank • S‑drive transmission • Fixed propeller • Twin steering wheels • Bow thruster • Annual servicing • Autopilot • VHF • Echo sounder • Log • Tridata • Compass • Stereo • Plotter • Wind instruments • B&G electronics • 220V system • 500 Ah capacity • Two water tanks (600 L total, PVC) • Two bilge pumps (automatic + manual) • Heating • Victron battery charger • Air‑conditioning throughout • Boiler • Water pump • Black water tank • External shower • Solar panels • Batteries 2025 • Four Harken winches • Lazy bag • Vang • Backstay • Furling genoa • Full‑batten mainsail • Tender • Electric outboard • Electric windlass with chain counter • Anchor and chain • Life raft (valid until 2029) • Eight fenders • Electric drop‑down swim platformIn conclusion, the Beneteau Oceanis 41.1 For Sale 2019 presents a practical and well‑maintained option for anyone looking for a comfortable cruising yacht that is ready to sail without requiring immediate work or upgrades. With thoughtful upkeep, a reliable engine, a well‑equipped sail plan and a reassuring range of modern systems on board, she offers a balanced blend of comfort and capability. Her spacious interior, generous cabin layout and user‑friendly deck arrangement make her suitable for both family cruising and longer coastal passages. Now available for viewing in Basilicata and offered at a negotiable price, she represents a straightforward and appealing opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable 41‑foot cruiser in good condition.
descriptionHtml:
Beneteau Oceanis 41.1 For Sale 2019 | Guest Cabins:3 | bathrooms:1

Engine hours 600 only!

The Beneteau Oceanis 41.1 For Sale 2019 is a well‑kept and attractively equipped sailing yacht, now available for viewing in Basilicata. Known for its balanced design, comfortable layout and reliable performance under sail or engine, this 2019 example stands out thanks to careful ownership and regular maintenance. With just one owner since new and annual servicing carried out, she is in good condition and ready for a new season on the water.

(Bimini,Autopilot,Solar panels)

Specification List
• GRP construction
• Teak cockpit
• Grey cockpit cushions
• Cast‑iron bulb keel
• Sprayhood
• Bimini
• Cockpit table with fridge
• LOA 12.43 m
• Beam 4.20 m
• Draft 2.19 m
• Displacement 7,836 kg
• One owner
• CE Category A
• Registered boat
• Safety certificate valid until 2027
• Capacity 12 persons
• Three double cabins
• One dinette berth
• One bathroom
• One shower compartment
• Light mahogany interior
• Stove, oven, fridge + freezer
• 32” smart TV
• 45 hp Yanmar engine (2019)
• 600 engine hours (updated Oct 2025)
• 200 L fuel tank
• S‑drive transmission
• Fixed propeller
• Twin steering wheels
• Bow thruster
• Annual servicing
• Autopilot
• VHF

• Compass
• Stereo

• Lazy bag
• Vang
• Backstay
• Furling genoa
• Full‑batten mainsail
• Tender
• Electric outboard
• Electric windlass with chain counter
• Anchor and chain

• Eight fenders
• Electric drop‑down swim platform

In conclusion, the Beneteau Oceanis 41.1 For Sale 2019 presents a practical and well‑maintained option for anyone looking for a comfortable cruising yacht that is ready to sail without requiring immediate work or upgrades. With thoughtful upkeep, a reliable engine, a well‑equipped sail plan and a reassuring range of modern systems on board, she offers a balanced blend of comfort and capability. Her spacious interior, generous cabin layout and user‑friendly deck arrangement make her suitable for both family cruising and longer coastal passages. Now available for viewing in Basilicata and offered at a negotiable price, she represents a straightforward and appealing opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable 41‑foot cruiser in good condition.
